learnings.text: Existing careerspan-webhook-v2 (port 8847) in Integrations/careerspan-webhook-v2/ currently only saves to inbox without triggering decomposer. New decomposer endpoint should use port 8848 to avoid conflicts. Existing FastAPI webhook patterns (recall-webhook, fathom-webhook) in N5/services/ use SQLite logging and should be referenced for consistency.
